name: Akio Morita
abstract: Akio Morita (盛田 昭夫, Morita Akio; January 26, 1921 – October 3, 1999) was a Japanese entrepreneur and co-founder of Sony along with Masaru Ibuka.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: when Akio Morita, the president of SONY, bought out Columbia, came over here, and invited all the Columbia people up to his penthouse apartment
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
